Horizon Pool Service keeps South Florida pools pristine year-round. Serving Miami-Dade and Broward with tailored maintenance for our climate.

What We Do

Our Services

Weekly Maintenance

Pool Equipment Repair

Salt Deposit Removal
SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Built for South Florida Pools

Founded in 2012, Horizon Pool Service grew from a single truck servicing Brickell condos to a 20+ team covering Miami-Dade and Broward. We've seen every pool challenge our tropical climate can create.

Our approach combines weekly maintenance routines with preventative care to combat salt air corrosion, intense UV damage, and seasonal debris from hurricanes. We stock only commercial-grade equipment built for coastal conditions.

As Miami residents ourselves, we're committed to preserving our waterways. All cleaning agents are EPA-approved to protect Biscayne Bay while keeping your pool safe.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Pool Service

Climate-Adapted Care

Our service plans account for Miami's salt air, heavy rains, and year-round use to prevent equipment wear.

Local Materials Knowledge

We specify corrosion-resistant parts that withstand our humidity, from pump seals to tile grout.

Hurricane Prep Included

Seasonal protocol protects equipment before storms and expedites post-storm cleanups.

Community Trusted

Recommended by 4/5 clients across 800+ completed projects since 2012.

Ready for Stress-Free Pool Care?

Schedule your consultation today. Same-week availability for most Miami neighborhoods.

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-poo-r90

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

After three companies failed to keep our Wynwood pool clear during mango season, Horizon solved it with custom filter cycles and enzyme treatments. Two years without a single algae bloom despite all the organic debris from our trees.

Mariana C. Weekly Maintenance
“

Our original 1998 pump died during July heat. Horizon had it rebuilt with upgraded seals within 24 hours while every big-box store quoted 3-week waits for replacements. Technician explained how to extend the new motor's life in salt air.

James T. Equipment Repair
“

The waterline on our Biscayne Point home looked permanently ruined until Horizon's treatment restored the original glass tile. They even matched a missing piece from the 1960s installation using their vendor network.

Lisa P. Salt Deposit Removal
“

Best investment for our snowbird lifestyle. The system texts me when chemical levels need attention or when heavy rain requires adjustment. Horizon programmed it to prepare automatically for our monthly absences.

Carlos R. Smart Pool Upgrades
“

Saved us $15k in unnecessary deck repairs. What we thought was a plumbing leak turned out to be groundwater infiltration during king tides. Their detailed report helped our insurance claim for the structural remediation.

Sophia K. Leak Diagnosis
“

As a Coral Gables historic board member, I appreciate how Horizon maintains our 1926 pool without compromising authenticity. They source period-appropriate replacement parts and use gentle methods on the original terrazzo.

Thomas V. Weekly Maintenance

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How does your weekly service differ from national chains?
We customize chemical balances for Miami's water table and test for salt creep that damages equipment. National providers often use generic protocols ill-suited for coastal environments.
Do you handle hurricane prep and cleanup?

Reach Out
